name: Hungarian Noodle Side Dish
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup (10.75 oz)
16 oz wide egg noodles, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease a Crock-Pot.
2. Cook the noodles in boiling water for 5 to 7 minutes; drain.
3. In a large bowl, dissolve bouillon in water.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (Worcestershire sauce, poppy seeds, garlic powder, hot pepper sauce, cottage cheese, sour cream, and cooked noodles) to the bowl. Stir until well combined.
5. Transfer the mixture to the Crock-Pot.
6. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and paprika.
7. Cover and cook on High for 3 to 4 hours.
8. Serve immediately.
Serves 8 to 10
